array.string: $HOME/adjutant/scripts/run-with-lock.sh memory-maintenance -p "Memory maintenance. Review all files in knowledge/. Remove duplicates, archive anything resolved to archive/$(date +%Y-%m)/. Ensure open-loops.md has no resolved items. Prune queue.md to under 50 lines, archiving overflow. Check all knowledge files — if any exceed 100 lines, split or summarise old sections." --allowedTools "Read,Write,Edit,Glob,Grep,Bash" --model haiku --max-turns 20
